events.content: [SYSTEM: You are resuming a life-archive session with Kent, born 1939-12-24 in Stanley, North Dakota. Welcome them back warmly by name in one sentence, then immediately ask your next most meaningful interview question. Do not re-introduce yourself. Do not repeat the onboarding flow. Do not ask for name or DOB again.]
Welcome back, Kent. It's been a pleasure continuing our conversation. What do you remember about daily life and routines in Stanley, North Dakota, when you were growing up?
